data.title: Industrias Unidas, S.A. de C.V. Announces Updates to Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Industrias Unidas, S.A. de C.V. (IUSA) has disclosed its audited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2025. These figures, prepared under Mexican Financial Reporting Standards (MFRS), deviate in some aspects from U.S. GAAP. It is crucial to note that results from interim periods may not accurately reflect future performance.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. Announce Results from Drilling Program at Surprise Creek Project, Saskatchewan
data.description: Vancouver, BC, 29th April 2026 - Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T) is excited to share that assay results from all 11 diamond drill holes at the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project have been received. The project is situated in a promising area northwest of the Athabasca Basin, renowned for its mineral resources. Mustang has signed an Option Agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd. to acquire an 80% interest in the Project, as outlined in news releases from June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, available on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: Cambridge-Lee Holdings Consolidated Results of Operations for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Cambridge-Lee Holdings, Inc. has released its audited consolidated results for Q4 of 2025. The company, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Tubo de Pasteje S.A. de C.V., disclosed its consolidated balance sheets as of December 31, 2025, and December 31, 2024. In US Dollars, current assets for 12/31/2024 included $298,409,000 in cash and cash equivalents and $78,187,000 in net accounts receivable. By 12/31/2025, these figures had shifted to $52,585,000 for cash and cash equivalents and $89,869,000 for net accounts receivable.

data.title: Samsara Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies List for Manufacturing and Logistics
data.description: In San Francisco, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT), a leading innovator in the Connected Operations® Platform, has recently been recognized for its extraordinary influence by being included in TIME’s list of the 100 Most Influential Companies of 2026 in the Manufacturing & Logistics sector. This prestigious list acknowledges companies globally for their significant impact, innovation, ambition, and influence. Samsara's inclusion in this category highlights its dedication to revolutionizing the industry.

data.title: Company behind Ayrton Senna's global brand reports eightfold growth, expands internationally
data.description: Senna Brands is expanding its focus from just licensing to establish a worldwide platform that includes partnerships, experiences, and owned assets. This shift is occurring over thirty years after the passing of Ayrton Senna, the three-time Formula One champion. The company aims to capitalize on the enduring popularity of Senna's legacy to fuel international business growth. The development was announced in São Paulo on April 29, 2026.

data.title: MGM China Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: MGM China Holdings Limited reported a 10% increase in revenue year-on-year, with a significant 19% rise in Daily Mass Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) compared to the previous year. This surge led to reaching a new high for the company. The announcement was made in Hong Kong on April 29, 2026. MGM China, listed under SEHK Stock Code: 2282, shared the unaudited financial data indicating the positive growth in its operations.

data.title: FIBRA Prologis Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: In Mexico City on April 29, 2026, FIBRA Prologis (BMV:FIBRAPL 14), a prominent owner and manager of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, announced its first quarter 2026 results. Key points include a notable 59.6 percent net effective rent on rollover during the quarter.

data.title: Bitcoin's rally halted as Fed maintains interest rates, pointing to ‘uncertainty’ in Middle East. BTC falls below $75k after release of FOMC minutes. Fed raises concerns about inflation and Iran conflict.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin fell below $75,000 following the release of the FOMC minutes, which revealed that the US Federal Reserve decided to maintain interest rates. The central bank also showed slight worries about inflation rates and the ongoing conflict in Iran.

data.title: Suzano Sells 12.7 Million Tonnes of Pulp for the First Time in Its History
data.description: In SÃO PAULO, Suzano (B3: SUZB3 | NYSE: SUZ), the leading global pulp producer, has reported its first quarter of 2026 (1Q26) results, revealing a new milestone in pulp sales. In the period from April 2025 to March 2026, Suzano achieved a record-breaking figure of 12.7 million tonnes of pulp sold, marking the highest volume in the company's history. Additionally, during the same timeframe, Suzano also sold 1.7 million tonnes of paper, encompassing various segments including packaging, printing and writing, specialty, and tissue.
